Feats.name: Startoss Comet

Class Features.name: Bonus Feat: Combat + Item Creation + Metamagic

bonuses.note: always treated as having a running start2
You gain a +4 bonus on Intimidate checks if you are larger than your target, and a –4 penalty on Intimidate checks if you are smaller than your target.
to conceal your dagger

Nanite SurgeracialFeatureAasimar.name: Nanite Surge
Nanite SurgeracialFeatureAasimar.title: Nanite Surge
Nanite SurgeracialFeatureAasimar.mainText: Cause your nanites to surge, granting a +13 bonus on any one d20 roll; this ability must be activated before the roll is made. When you use this power, your circuitry-tattoos glow with light equivalent to that of a torch in illumination for 1 round

Spell CombatclassFeatureMagus.name: Spell Combat
Spell CombatclassFeatureMagus.shortText: Fight with a one-handed or light weapon and cast a spell as if two-weapon fighting. You may choose to take up to a {{bold}}-4{{/bold}} penalty on your attack roll to gain an equivalent circumstance bonus on a concentration check.

Arcane PoolclassFeatureMagus.name: Arcane Pool
Arcane PoolclassFeatureMagus.shortText: Expend 1 use of your Arcane Pool to add enhancement bonuses to your weapon.

Doubleblessing.name: Double
Doubleblessing.mainText: As a move action, create an illusory double of yourself. This functions as a single mirror image and lasts for 5 rounds, or until the duplicate is dispelled or destroyed.

Unholy Strikeblessing.name: Unholy Strike
Unholy Strikeblessing.mainText: Touch one weapon and grant it an additional 1d6 points of damage against good creatures. The weapon is treated as evil for the purposes of overcoming damage reduction. This doesn't stack with the unholy weapon special ability

FervorclassFeatureWarpriest.name: Fervor
FervorclassFeatureWarpriest.shortText: As a standard action, damage living creatures or heal undead creatures for 2d6 points of damage, unless used against yourself, in which case it is a Swift action.

Fervor (Cast spell)classFeatureWarpriest.name: Fervor (Cast spell)
Fervor (Cast spell)classFeatureWarpriest.mainText: As a swift action, expend one use of fervor to cast any one warpriest spell you have prepared with a casting time of 1 round or shorter. When cast in this way, the spell can target only you. Spells cast in this way ignore somatic components and do not provoke attacks of opportunity.

SpellstrikeclassFeatureMagus.name: Spellstrike
SpellstrikeclassFeatureMagus.shortText: You may cast a spell of range "touch" from the magus spell list and deliver it through your weapon as part of a melee attack. You get one free melee attack with your weapon at your highest base attack bonus to deliver this attack as part of casting the spell. You may use this with Spell Combat. The spell uses the weapon's critical threat range, dealing 2x damage on a critical hit. Note: spells that apply are denoted with ♦.

bonuses.note: can deliver a single-target touch attack ranged spell through a ranged weapon attack

Black Blade StrikeclassFeatureMagus.name: Black Blade Strike
Black Blade StrikeclassFeatureMagus.shortText: Expend 1 use of your Black Blade's arcane pool to grant it a +2 bonus on damage rolls for 1 minute.

Enhance Sacred WeaponclassFeatureWarprie.name: Enhance Sacred Weapon
Enhance Sacred WeaponclassFeatureWarprie.shortText: Add enhancement bonuses to your weapon, using 1 use of this ability per round, per weapon enchanted.

Channel Negative EnergyclassFeatureWarpr.name: Channel Negative Energy
Channel Negative EnergyclassFeatureWarpr.subTitle: +2d6
Channel Negative EnergyclassFeatureWarpr.shortText: Channel 2d6 energy in a 30 foot burst, dealing either positive or negative energy dependending on alignment. Consumes 2 uses of Fervor.

Energy Attunement 1classFeatureMagus.name: Energy Attunement 1
Energy Attunement 1classFeatureMagus.shortText: Expend 1 use of your Black Blade's arcane pool to cause it to deal Cold, Electricity, or Fire damage instead of weapon damage.

Energy Attunement 2classFeatureMagus.name: Energy Attunement 2
Energy Attunement 2classFeatureMagus.shortText: Expend 1 use of your Black Blade's arcane pool to cause it to deal Sonic or Force damage instead of weapon damage.

Startoss Stylefeat.name: Startoss Style
Startoss Stylefeat.mainText: Enter Startoss Style, gaining bonuses with your chosen weapon from the thrown fighter weapon group.

Sneak Attackspecial.name: Sneak Attack
Sneak Attackspecial.title: Sneak Attack
Sneak Attackspecial.subTitle: +3d6
Sneak Attackspecial.preText: Add 3d6 precision damage when you damage a foe within 30 feet that is caught flat-footed, denied its Dexterity bonus to AC, or when flanking. Does not affect Aeons, Elementals, Incorporeal beings, Oozes, Proteans, or Swarms.

Death AttackclassFeatureAssassin.name: Death Attack
Death AttackclassFeatureAssassin.mainText: You can study your victim for 3 rounds and then make a sneak attack with a melee weapon. If you deal damage, the sneak attack has the additional effect of either paralyzing or killing the target (your choice). Studying the victim is a standard action. The death attack fails if the target detects you or recognizes you as an enemy. If the victim fails a Fortitude save against the kill effect, they die. If the saving throw fails against the paralysis effect, the victim is rendered helpless for 1d6 + 5 rounds. You must make this attack within 3 rounds of finishing your study or you must start over.

Poison Weaponspecial.name: Poison Weapon
Poison Weaponspecial.title: Poison Weapon
Poison Weaponspecial.mainText: Applying a poison is a standard action. You cannot poison yourself while applying the poison, but if you roll a Natural 1 on your attack roll, you expose yourself to the poison.

bonuses.note: vs. mind-affecting effects, paralysis, poison, and stun effects

bonuses.value: Fatigue, Exhaustion, Disease, Sleep, Fear, Emotion-based effects. Cannot gain morale bonuses

bonuses.note: when receiving magical healing you heal 2 extra points per die rolled, but take 1 extra damage vs. cold iron

bonuses.value: Cannot be caught flanked or receive sneak attack from flanking unless sneak attack class is 4+ class levels higher.
Immune to disease, sleep effects, fear effects, and all emotion-based effects
Cannot be caught flat-footed. Invisible attackers do not deny Dex bonus to AC (still lost when immobilized or successfully feinted against).

0.name: Bleed

0.short_description: Detects spells and magic items within 60 ft.

1.name: Command
1.short_description: One subject obeys a command for 1 round.

1.name: Endure Elements
1.short_description: Exist comfortably in hot or cold regions.

1.name: Murderous Command
1.short_description: Target is compelled to kill its ally.

1.name: Summon Monster I

1.short_description: Summons extraplanar creature to fight for you.

2.name: Bear's Endurance

2.short_description: Subject gains +4 to Con for 1 min./level.

2.name: Bone Fists
2.components: V, S, M (the knucklebone of a dire animal)
2.targets: 1 creature/level, no two of which can be more than 30 feet apart

2.name: Detect Magic, Greater
2.short_description: As detect magic, but learn more information.

2.name: Restoration, Lesser
2.short_description: Dispels magical ability penalty or repairs 1d4 ability damage.

2.name: Summon Monster II
2.components: V, S, F/DF (a tiny bag and a small candle)
2.short_description: Summons extraplanar creature to fight for you.

3.name: Animate Dead
3.components: V, S, M (an onyx gem worth at least 25 gp per Hit Die of the undead)

3.name: Dispel Magic
3.short_description: Cancels one magical spell or effect.

3.name: Summon Monster III
3.components: V, S, F/DF (a tiny bag and a small candle)
3.short_description: Summons extraplanar creature to fight for you.

4.name: Restoration
4.components: V, S, M (diamond dust worth 100 gp or 1,000 gp, see text)
4.short_description: Restores level and ability score drains.

0.name: Arcane Mark
0.effect: one personal rune or mark, all of which must fit within 1 sq. ft.
0.short_description: Inscribes a personal rune on an object or creature (visible or invisible).

0.name: Daze
0.components: V, S, M (a pinch of wool or similar substance)
0.targets: one humanoid creature of 4 HD or less
0.short_description: Humanoid creature of 4 HD or less loses next action.

0.name: Mage Hand
0.targets: one nonmagical, unattended object weighing up to 5 lbs.

0.name: Read Magic
0.components: V, S, F (a clear crystal or mineral prism)

1.name: Chill Touch
1.targets: creature or creatures touched (up to one/level)
1.saving_throw: Fortitude partial or Will negates; see text
1.short_description: One touch/level deals 1d6 damage and possibly 1 Str damage.

1.name: Mount
1.components: V, S, M (a bit of horse hair)

1.name: Ray Of Enfeeblement
1.short_description: Ray causes 1d6 Str penalty + 1 per 2 levels.

1.name: Shield
1.short_description: Invisible disc gives +4 to AC, blocks magic missiles.

1.name: Snowball (PotN)
1.effect: one ball of ice and snow
1.short_description: Throw a conjured ball of snow at a target.

2.name: Brow Gasher
2.short_description: Slashing weapon deals bleed damage to an opponent's head.

2.name: Darkness
2.components: V, M/DF (bat fur and a piece of coal)

2.name: Defending Bone
2.components: V, S, F (a Medium creature's skull or femur), DF

3.name: Arcane Sight
3.short_description: Magical auras become visible to you.

3.name: Vampiric Touch
3.short_description: Touch deals 1d6 damage/2 levels; caster gains damage as temporary hp.

weapons.name: Black Blade
weapons.benefit: You get a +2 bonus on Sleight of Hand skill checks made to conceal a dagger on your body.

weapons.name: Dagger
weapons.benefit: You get a +2 bonus on Sleight of Hand skill checks made to conceal a dagger on your body.

bonuses.note: You can shoot or throw ranged weapons at an opponent engaged in melee without taking the standard -4 penalty on your attack roll.
Anyone raising someone slain by your death attack must succeed at a DC 20 caster level check to do so (unless remove curse succeeds 1 round before)
